examples: Only then will you find the Mapmaker, who prepares a new world for the old.
Including new custom dialogs, which the mapmaker will be able to set up by means of ERM or templates (there will be a special utility for it).
A.F. mapmaker named Walter Russell (Patrick Bergin) and flown to Montreal to be treated for tuberculosis.
Because of his drafting skills, Sneden, then 29, got a coveted post as a mapmaker.
Unbeknownst to Scipio, this secretary had been Hannibal's mapmaker before that general's crushing defeat.
